text: BREAKING: Government to impose emergency lockdown across Maharashtra — sources say decision finalised, announcement expected at midnight. Hospitals put on standby.
Spreading rumour about communal violence near Jama Masjid area — viral WhatsApp message claims police have opened fire on protesters, no official confirmation.
False information about SBI bank collapse circulating on WhatsApp groups — message urging immediate cash withdrawal causing panic at ATMs across Bengaluru.
Fake terror attack alert circulating on WhatsApp — message claims imminent attack on Chennai Metro with police intelligence confirmation. Complete fabrication.
Manipulated riot images being shared as recent Hyderabad clashes — images are from 2019 unrelated incident, designed to inflame communal tensions.
False vaccine side-effect claims viral on social media — article claiming new booster causing heart failure, completely contradicts ICMR and WHO data.
Misleading election manipulation claims spreading — article alleges EVM hacking in Rajasthan by-elections with no verifiable evidence provided.
Unverified reports about hospital oxygen shortage spreading on Telegram — message claims patients dying at Pune hospital, authorities deny any such incident.
BREAKING: Scientists confirm 5G towers are spreading COVID-19, government hiding evidence, hospitals overwhelmed with victims
